title: Survival of Illusion
overview: This short film tells the story of a student named Nana, who plays too much games and is trapped in the illusion of the game itself. But... Nana's illusion is no ordinary illusion... Instead, she has been hit by an Imperius spell from David, a wizard from the Wizard Lineage Series (continued from one of the scenes in Wizard Lineage episode 3) which is a forbidden spell. Will Nana be able to face it all???
